title: Point Defense Operations
summary: Defensive fire against incoming missiles and torpedoes.
details: Point defense is purely defensive - intercept incoming ordnance before impact. Track incoming missiles early and begin engagement at maximum effective range. Prioritize missiles by time-to-impact, not distance. Use rapid-fire weapons with wide spread. Against multiple inbound, prioritize those you can intercept over those you cannot. Coordinate with pilot for evasive support.
annotations: Point defense has highest priority over offensive fire.
Some munitions are too fast to intercept - evade instead.
